title: Declared Entity Index
description: Schema for the unified declared truth registry. This is the overarching index that links all declared architecture entities across registries. Intentionally uses additionalProperties: true on 'ref' to accommodate evolving sub-schemas without requiring synchronized updates.

id.description: Stable identity key for this entity. Derived from the source record's primary identifier.

type.description: The declared truth registry this entity originates from.

ref.description: Full reference to the source record. Schema varies by type — validated by the type-specific schema, not here.
